underlying_goal: Upgrade Laravel project from version 12 to version 13
friction_detail: Claude tried too many complex workarounds (aliases, local repositories, git tags) instead of simply updating all packages at once; kept getting interrupted for working inefficiently
brief_summary: User wanted to upgrade to Laravel 13; Claude eventually got there but took an overly complex approach, removed many packages unnecessarily, and left some issues unresolved (route controller error at the end).
